## Checklist

- [ ] This PR addresses exactly one release task ID.
- [ ] Tests or a repeatable verification script cover the change.
- [ ] Documentation and configuration are updated when behavior changes.
- [ ] No credentials, personal data, generated caches, or unrelated files are included.
- [ ] All required review conversations and CI checks are resolved.
